code: import React from'react';import'./PeerCard.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const PeerCard=_ref=>{let{peer,onConnect,isConnecting}=_ref;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"peer-card fade-in",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"peer-header",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"peer-avatar",children:peer.name?peer.name.charAt(0).toUpperCase():'💻'}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"peer-info",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{className:"peer-name",children:peer.name||'Unknown Device'}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"peer-status-row",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"status-dot ".concat(peer.isOnline?'online':'offline')}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"peer-status-text",children:peer.isOnline?'Online':'Offline'})]})]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"peer-details",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"detail-row",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"detail-label",children:"ID:"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"detail-value truncate",title:peer.peerId,children:peer.peerId})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"detail-row",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"detail-label",children:"IP:"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"detail-value",children:peer.ip||'Unknown'})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"detail-row",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"detail-label",children:"Last Seen:"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"detail-value",children:new Date(peer.lastSeen).toLocaleTimeString()})]})]}),peer.isOnline&&onConnect&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"peer-connect-btn",onClick:()=>onConnect(peer.peerId,peer.name),disabled:isConnecting,children:isConnecting?'Connecting...':'Connect'})]});};export default PeerCard;
